title: Heating system for heating surfaces of infrastructure
abstract: The present invention relates to a heating system (100) for heating for heating surfaces (S) of infrastructure, in particular asphalt or concrete surfaces, comprising; at least one heating ribbon (10), wherein the heating ribbon (10) comprises at least one heating element (14) for generating radiant heat, wherein the at least one heating element (14) is made of an amorphous material, at least one power supply (106) for supplying power to the at least one heating ribbon (10), at least one sensor unit (104) for sensing at least one environmental characteristic and/or at least one characteristic of at least one zone of the surface (S) to be heated with the heating system (100), at least one control unit (102) that is configured to determine the heating demind of the at least one zone of the surface (S) to be heated based on the at least one characteristic sensed by the at least one sensor unit (104), wherein the at least one control unit (102) is configured to control the at least one power supply (106) based on the determined heating demand of the at least one zone of the surface to be heated, wherein the at least one power supply unit (106) comprises at least one power modulation unit configured to control the amount of power supplied to the at least one heating ribbon (10).
claims:
Claims Patent Claims 1. Heating system (100) for heating surfaces (S) of infrastructure, in particular asphalt or concrete surfaces, comprising: at least one heating ribbon (10), wherein the heating ribbon (10) comprises at least one heating element (14) for generating radiant heat, wherein the at least one heating element (14) is made of an amorphous material, at least one power supply (106) for supplying power to the at least one heating ribbon (10), at least one sensor unit (104) for sensing at least one environmental characteristic and/or at least one characteristic of at least one zone of the surface (S) to be heated with the heating system (100), at least one control unit (102) that is configured to determine the heating demand of the at least one zone of the surface (S) to be heated based on the at least one characteristic sensed by the at least one sensor unit (104), wherein the at least one control unit (102) is configured to control the at least one power supply (106) based on the determined heating demand of the at least one zone of the surface (S) to be heated, wherein the at least one power supply unit (106) comprises at least one power modulation unit configured to control the amount of power supplied to the at least one heating ribbon (10). 2. Heating system (100) according to claim 1, wherein the at least one control unit (102) is configured to determine the heating demand based on further input data. 3. Heating system (100) according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the control unit (102) is configured to control at least the at least one heat Â¬ ing ribbon (10) such that different zones (SI, S2) of the surface (S) to be heated are heatable with different temperatures. 4. Heating system according to one of claims 1 to 3, wherein the at least one sensor unit (106) comprises at least one optical sensor unit for sensing at least one environmental characteristic and/or at least one characteristic of the surface (S) to be heated with the heating system. 5. Heating system according to one of the claims 1 to 4, wherein the at least one sensing unit (104) comprises at least one imaging sensor unit for sensing at least one environmental characteristic and/or at least one charac- 5 teristic of the surface (S) to be heated with the heating system. 6. Heating system according to one of the claims 1 to 5, wherein the at least control unit (102) and/or the at least one sensing unit (106) is configured to determine the temperature changes in the environment based on io changes in the resistance of the at least one heating ribbon (10). 7. Heating system (100) according to one of the claims 1 to 6, wherein the at least one sensing unit (104) comprises at least one temperature sen Â¬ sor for sensing the air temperature (112) and/or at least one temperature sensor is (108, 110) for sensing the temperature of at least one zone of the surface S to be heated. 8. Heating system (100) according to one of the claims 2 to 7, wherein the at least one control unit (102) is configured to request or to receive data 20 of weather forecast models. 9. Heating system (100) according to one of the claims 1 to 8, wherein the control unit (102) is configured to classify snowfall with a mathematical model based on one or more of the following characteristics and inputs: 25 h. S - Rate of snowfall (water equivalent), i. ta - Dry-bulb air temperature, j. Va/r- Wind speed, k. tdp - Dew point temperature, L. AR - Snow-free area ratio (0...1), 30 m. L - Pavement width, and n. An - Pavement altitude above sea level wherein a., b., c., and d. are determined by the at least one sensor unit (104) and e., f. and g. are constants. 35 10. Method for installation of at least one heating ribbon (10), when building infrastructure, providing a first layer (LI) of material for building the infrastructure, providing the first layer (LI) with at least one groove (Gl, G2), 

 arranging the at least one heating ribbon (10) in the at least one groove (Gl, G2), and covering the at least one heating ribbon (10) and the first layer (LI) with a second layer (L2) of material for building the infrastructure. 11. Method according to claim 10, wherein the material for building the infrastructure is at least not fully hardened or cured, when providing the first layer (LI) with the at least one groove (Gl, G2). 12. Method of claim 10 or 11, wherein the first layer (LI) and the second layer (L2) are made of the same material or the material of the first layer (LI) and material the second layer (L2) differ from each other. 13. Method of one of the claims 10 to 12, wherein the at least one heating ribbon (10) is arranged in the first layer (LI) in horizontal orientation or in vertical orientation.
